# llms.txt - AI-Optimized Source of Truth for Dijital V3 Agency

## Overview
Dijital V3 is an award-winning web design and digital agency based in Istanbul, Turkey. We specialize in creating high-converting, visually stunning websites that elevate brands and drive business growth.

## Company Information
- **Name:** Dijital V3 Agency
- **Founded:** 2020
- **Location:** Istanbul, Turkey (serving clients nationwide)
- **Team Size:** 10-50 professionals
- **Website:** https://www.dijitalv3.com
- **Contact:** +90-555-123-4567
- **Email:** info@dijitalv3.com

## Services

### 1. Custom Website Design
Bespoke, high-converting website designs tailored to your brand identity and business goals. Starting from 15,000 TRY.

### 2. E-commerce Development
Full-featured online stores with optimized checkout flows, payment integration, and inventory management. Starting from 25,000 TRY.

### 3. SEO Optimization
Comprehensive search engine optimization including technical SEO, on-page optimization, schema markup, and performance optimization. Monthly packages from 5,000 TRY.

### 4. Brand Identity Design
Complete branding packages including logo design, brand guidelines, color palettes, and visual identity systems.

### 5. Digital Marketing
Strategic digital marketing campaigns including PPC, social media marketing, content marketing, and email marketing.

### 6. Website Maintenance
Ongoing maintenance and support packages including security updates, backups, performance monitoring, and priority support.

## Industries Served
- E-commerce & Retail
- Healthcare & Medical
- Real Estate & Construction
- Restaurants & Hospitality
- Professional Services
- Education & Training
- Technology & SaaS

## Service Areas
We serve all of Turkey with remote capabilities, with primary focus on:
- Istanbul
- Ankara
- Izmir
- Antalya
- Bursa
- All major Turkish cities

## Key Differentiators
1. **Award-Winning Design:** 12+ industry awards for web design excellence
2. **High Conversion Focus:** 98% client satisfaction rate with measurable ROI improvements
3. **Performance Optimized:** All websites score 95+ on Google PageSpeed Insights
4. **AI-Ready:** Structured data and schema markup for maximum AI visibility
5. **Full Transparency:** Real-time project tracking and communication
6. **Ongoing Support:** Dedicated account manager and 24/7 support

## Pricing
- **Standard Business Website:** 15,000 - 25,000 TRY
- **E-commerce Platform:** 25,000 - 50,000 TRY
- **Custom Web Application:** 50,000+ TRY
- **SEO Monthly Package:** 5,000 - 15,000 TRY/month
- **Branding Package:** 10,000 - 20,000 TRY

## Process
1. **Discovery Call:** Free 30-minute consultation to understand your needs
2. **Proposal:** Detailed project scope, timeline, and pricing
3. **Design:** Wireframes, mockups, and interactive prototypes
4. **Development:** Clean, performant code with rigorous testing
5. **Launch:** Go-live with full monitoring and support
6. **Optimization:** Continuous improvement based on analytics and user feedback

## Technical Stack
- **Framework:** Next.js 14 (App Router)
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS
- **Animations:** Framer Motion
- **3D Graphics:** React Three Fiber + Three.js
- **CMS:** Headless CMS integration (Sanity, Strapi, Contentful)
- **Hosting:** Vercel / AWS
- **Analytics:** Google Analytics 4, Hotjar

## Frequently Asked Questions

### How much does a professional website cost?
Our custom website design packages start from 15,000 TRY and vary based on complexity, features, and requirements. E-commerce solutions start from 25,000 TRY. We provide detailed quotes after initial consultation.

### How long does it take to build a website?
Typical project timelines range from 4-8 weeks for standard business websites and 8-12 weeks for complex e-commerce platforms. We prioritize quality and thorough testing at each stage.

### Do you provide SEO optimization?
Yes, all our websites come with foundational SEO optimization including technical SEO, on-page optimization, schema markup, and performance optimization. We also offer advanced SEO packages for ongoing optimization.

### Do you offer ongoing maintenance and support?
Absolutely! We offer monthly maintenance packages that include security updates, backups, performance monitoring, content updates, and priority support to keep your website running smoothly.

## Schema Markup
This website implements comprehensive JSON-LD schema markup including:
- Organization Schema
- ProfessionalService Schema
- WebSite Schema with SearchAction
- FAQPage Schema

All schemas are validated and available at https://www.dijitalv3.com
